summary: Plan 08 is implementation-ready after its explicit gate-baseline prerequisite: 08A now owns the trust-declared endpoint predicate, the unconditional validation/execution backstop, source and sink YAML/seed evidence, and every composer mutation surface; 08B is only guided-source prompt parity after Plan 06. Live signed-tier drift and a Wardline analysis-budget failure are tracked separately and block 08A rather than being hidden in prose.

review_basis.head: aa71969808ee72690cd144f0de34fe26ff7511d9
review_basis.baseline: Fresh Loomweave index plus live validation, execution, composer mutation, YAML/seed persistence, guided prompt, signed tier-model, Wardline, Plans 00/06/07, and Filigree dependency surfaces.

warnings.detail: 08A is not executable now. Filigree elspeth-c0103e6c88 is blocked by P1 gate-baseline task elspeth-8166b310e7; 08B remains blocked by Plan 06 and 08A.
Plan-08 edits stale existing signed tier-model scopes. Agents diagnose only; an operator reviews and runs the signing path, then agents rerun diagnosis and the shape-only verification gate.

Wardline 1.3.1 currently emits active WLN-ENGINE-PYDANTIC-DISCOVERY-LIMIT at work 367820/367776. A full authoritative scan must complete before the gate-baseline task closes; narrowing, baselining, or waiving is forbidden.

YAML import and E2E seed may persist endpoint-invalid state for repair, but mark it invalid. The unconditional execution preflight is the final backstop for imported, reverted, forked, and legacy state.

resolved_findings.resolution: The new predicate carries an explicit Tier-3 trust boundary, static non-interpolating error prose, null semantics, and focused helper coverage.
The false six-site inventory was replaced by all nine direct constructors, both patch paths, secret/blob wiring, delegations, imports/seeds, and copy/legacy behavior.
Central validation tests cover source and sink, omission/null, static redaction, check order/count, exact error attribution, and no settings/plugin/network work.
A real execution-service endpoint-invalid state proves rejection before create_run and closes the revert/fork/legacy backstop.
YAML import and E2E seed each cover source and sink using response-visible is_valid and validation_errors rather than nonexistent persisted check diagnostics.
Immediate composer rejection now includes set/patch source and output, all set_pipeline branches, recipe delegation, raw/resolved blob source, secret-ref wiring, and inline-blob wiring.
The guided prompt change has a focused behavior assertion and is isolated in 08B after the source registration exists.
Plans 06 and 07 own explicit source/sink assertions that endpoint_url is not an allowed secret-ref field, plus positive CLI load-and-instantiation tests.
The existing YAML-path trust-evidence failure is repaired directly in the route surface already touched by 08A and included in the tracker target files.
Signed allowlist drift and Wardline degraded analysis are first-class operator/tooling work in elspeth-8166b310e7, which now blocks 08A in Filigree.
Plans 00, 06, and 07 and both Plan-08 tracker slices now describe the same gate-baseline -> 08A -> registration -> 08B dependency semantics.

verification: Loomweave index refreshed at aa71969808ee72690cd144f0de34fe26ff7511d9 before source inspection
all direct source/output constructors and option-only mutation paths reconciled against live code
execution, persistence, revert/fork, guided, CLI, and cross-plan chokepoints reconciled
Filigree 08A/08B metadata and dependency edges updated without claiming or transitioning implementation work
gate-baseline task reparented under Wave 1; live Filigree plan now counts 16 steps and renders it beside blocked 08A
read-only signed-entry diagnosis executed and existing drift surfaced rather than bypassed
trust-boundary gate baseline executed and its existing YAML-route evidence defect assigned to 08A
Wardline full scan and explain loop executed; active engine budget defect tracked as a blocker
three independent specialist reviews rerun after repair

review_history.summary: Initial review found a missing trust declaration, false authoring-path inventory, incomplete blob/secret/import/seed coverage, an unimplementable persisted-diagnostics assertion, weak import-boundary evidence, untested guided prose, absent static/Wardline closeout, stale tracker targets, and hidden signed-gate/tooling prerequisites.
